---
title: "F1 Data Analysis"
subtitle: "Weekly Formula 1 race breakdowns — built with Python & FastF1"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

New analysis every race weekend. Each post digs into the telemetry, strategy, and
pace behind the result — with the code on [GitHub](https://github.com/victorborba7/f1-data-analysis).
